task.title: Admin API gRPC Foundation
task.description: Set up Go project with gRPC services and grpc-gateway for REST API

implementation.details:
1. Initialize Go module with gRPC dependencies
2. Define protobuf schemas for all services
3. Generate Go code and grpc-gateway handlers
4. Set up basic server with health checks
5. Add structured logging with zap

task.acceptance_criteria: gRPC server starts successfully, health checks respond, protobuf compilation works, basic service calls succeed
